---
title: "Ivan Pozdniakov"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile_old.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: telegram
      text: Telegram
      href: https://t.me/pozdniakovivan
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Pozdniakov
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ivanspozdniakov@gmail.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: cv/cv_germany.pdf
---

## About

Researcher, R developer, and statistics educator based in Kiel, Germany.
MSc in Cognitive Sciences (HSE, Moscow); background in brain stimulation and
neuroimaging — TMS, tACS, EEG, MEG.

My trajectory runs from experimental neuroscience toward computational modeling —
a deliberate accumulation of empirical, statistical, and programming skills built
over a decade of research and teaching. Looking for a PhD position at the
intersection of computation, cognition, and neural dynamics.

My curiosity extends well beyond neuroscience — to philosophy of mind, digital
humanities, history, and a few other rabbit holes.


## Projects

::: {.project-item}
### Data Analysis and Statistics in R
Free textbook (Russian) on wrangling, visualization, statistics, and reproducible
workflows with R and the tidyverse.

[Read the book](https://pozdniakov.github.io/tidy_stats/) · [Source](https://github.com/Pozdniakov/tidy_stats)
:::

::: {.project-item}
### {rdracor} — CRAN Package
R client for the DraCor API — programmatic access to multilingual drama corpora
in TEI-XML. Play texts, metadata, character networks.

[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=rdracor) · [GitHub](https://github.com/dracor-org/rdracor)
:::

::: {.project-item}
### DraCor Shiny App
Interactive visualization of drama corpus data — character interaction networks,
corpus statistics, text exploration.

[GitHub](https://github.com/dracor-org/dracor-shiny)
:::

::: {.project-item}
### Live-Coding Data Analysis — YouTube
Unscripted streams working through real datasets in R: wrangling, modeling,
visualization.

[Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9giMhVoDQ0T3TPrx3qBgOQ)
:::

::: {.project-item .font-showcase}
### QuaziNote — Free Typeface
A free typeface in two styles — Regular and Condensed. Available to download and use freely.

[Download Regular](fonts/QuaziNote-Regular.otf) · [Download Condensed](fonts/QuaziNote-Condensed.otf)
:::

```{=html}
<canvas id="bg-canvas"></canvas>
<script>
(function () {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('bg-canvas');
  document.body.appendChild(canvas); /* move out of trestles container */
  const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');

  const ACCENT   = '20,184,166';   /* teal-500 */
  const mobile   = window.innerWidth < 992;
  const COUNT    = mobile ? 28 : 70;
  const LINK_D   = mobile ? 130 : 200;
  const MOUSE_D  = mobile ? 160 : 240;

  let W, H, nodes, mouse = { x: -999, y: -999 }, resizeTimer, lastW = 0;

  function resize() {
    const newW = window.innerWidth;
    if (newW === lastW) return;   /* ignore iOS address-bar height flicker */
    lastW = newW;
    W = canvas.width  = newW;
    H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  }

  function initNodes() {
    nodes = Array.from({ length: COUNT }, () => ({
      x:  Math.random() * W,
      y:  Math.random() * H,
      vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4,
      vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.4,
      r:  Math.random() * 2.2 + 1.8,
    }));
  }

  window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
    clearTimeout(resizeTimer);
    resizeTimer = setTimeout(resize, 150);
  });
  window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { mouse.x = e.clientX; mouse.y = e.clientY; });
  window.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { mouse.x = -999; mouse.y = -999; });

  resize();
  initNodes();

  function drawLink(ax, ay, bx, by, alpha) {
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${ACCENT},${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth   = 1.0;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(ax, ay);
    ctx.lineTo(bx, by);
    ctx.stroke();
  }

  function loop() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

    /* node–node links */
    for (let i = 0; i < COUNT; i++) {
      for (let j = i + 1; j < COUNT; j++) {
        const dx = nodes[i].x - nodes[j].x;
        const dy = nodes[i].y - nodes[j].y;
        const d  = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (d < LINK_D) drawLink(nodes[i].x, nodes[i].y, nodes[j].x, nodes[j].y,
                                  (1 - d / LINK_D) * 0.35);
      }
    }

    /* cursor links */
    for (const n of nodes) {
      const dx = n.x - mouse.x;
      const dy = n.y - mouse.y;
      const d  = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      if (d < MOUSE_D) drawLink(n.x, n.y, mouse.x, mouse.y,
                                 (1 - d / MOUSE_D) * 0.55);
    }

    /* nodes */
    for (const n of nodes) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(n.x, n.y, n.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${ACCENT},0.75)`;
      ctx.fill();

      n.x += n.vx;
      n.y += n.vy;
      if (n.x < 0 || n.x > W) n.vx *= -1;
      if (n.y < 0 || n.y > H) n.vy *= -1;
    }

    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }

  loop();
})();
</script>
```
